I can schedule that — a quick question first: 10:00 on 2024-05-19 is already booked (Project Kick-off, 10:00–11:00). Which of these alternatives do you want me to use for the one-hour follow-up?

- 09:00–10:00 (earlier that morning)

- Another time that day — tell me a preferred start time

Also please confirm (or provide):

- Participants to invite (emails), if any (if you don’t want to invite anyone I’ll create it on your calendar only)

- Short description — I can use: "Follow-up to review progress and next steps from the previous meeting."

Tell me the choices and I’ll create the event.
